headline: Meta Tests AI Tool That Finds Products Based On Your Profile
summary: Meta goes all-in on AI: From new shopping tools and infrastructure groups to $50M news deals. Is $META stock a buy during the dip?

headline: News Corp's Meta deal. Are news organisations no more than LLM 'input companies'?
summary: With two major AI licensing agreements now signed in under two years, Rupert Murdoch's company has stopped asking whether to deal and started asking how much. The rest of the industry is following. There is a version of this story in which News Corp (NASDAQ:NWSA) is the cautionary tale: a...
